---
title: "types.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/types.ts"
loc: 21
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.25
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 5.81
overall_score: 6.48
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
Internal logic only.
